sprint.name: Forge Expansion Sprint
sprint.note: A scheduled review is not a guaranteed release. The forge publishes at most one coherent change when it clears the quality and safety gates; otherwise it skips the window.
sprint.secondaryAutomation: A separate GitHub Actions workflow runs Tuesday and Friday at 15:17 UTC. It can only create or improve approved declarative-engine apps and records accepted publishes in this ledger.

method.label: Inspect
method.description: Review the live site, repository, current apps, open feedback, bugs, depth, accessibility, and portfolio gaps.

method.label: Compare
method.description: Consider at least three candidate changes and choose the one that creates the strongest useful depth or breadth.

method.label: Build one
method.description: Create or improve one coherent feature or app, including mobile, keyboard, touch, reduced-motion, teardown, and edge cases.

method.label: Validate
method.description: Run JavaScript syntax checks, feedback-routing tests, registry rules, required-file checks, and safety-boundary validation.

method.label: Publish or skip
method.description: Merge and deploy only after every required check passes. Skip when the candidate is weak, unsafe, duplicative, or incomplete.

qualityGates: One coherent change maximum per review window
No secrets, trackers, accounts, hidden storage, or unreviewed network behavior
No direct execution of user feedback
Mobile, keyboard, touch, focus, and reduced-motion behavior considered
Repository validation must pass before main is published

queue.title: Lantern Lanes campaign progression and procedural patrols
queue.reason: Only expand if future work adds validated procedural patrol puzzles, stronger campaign unlocks, or richer recovery without obscuring the new guided-practice path.

queue.title: Aquifer Commons cooperative governance and procedural basins
queue.reason: Only expand if future work adds validated procedural geology, richer stakeholder bargaining, or cooperative hydrologist and community roles without storage or network behavior.

queue.title: Stratosphere Mission Control procedural forecasts and cooperative roles
queue.reason: Only expand if future work adds validated procedural wind fields, richer sensor packages, or cooperative pilot and science-officer roles without storage or network behavior.

queue.title: Pollinator Corridor Planner cooperative stewardship and procedural landscapes
queue.reason: Only expand if future work adds validated procedural terrain, richer species interactions, or cooperative landowner and ecologist roles without storage or network behavior.

queue.title: Animation Timing Studio multi-object staging and onion-skin variants
queue.reason: Only expand if future work adds validated multi-object choreography, onion-skin comparison, or cooperative director and animator roles without storage or network behavior.

queue.title: Microgrid Dispatcher cooperative operations and procedural forecasts
queue.reason: Only expand if future work adds validated procedural demand profiles, transmission constraints, or cooperative operator and field-crew roles without storage or network behavior.

queue.title: Seed Bank Steward cooperative curation and provenance
queue.reason: Only expand if future work adds validated accession provenance, pollination networks, or cooperative curator and field-scientist roles without storage or network behavior.

recentDecisions.title: Lantern Lanes 1.1.0
recentDecisions.summary: Prioritized valid user feedback over another new app, adding a six-step failure-free practice courtyard, persistent route guide, symbol and control explanations, visible patrol beats, practice completion, campaign switching, mobile layouts, keyboard and touch controls, reduced motion, and teardown while preserving the existing stealth campaign.

recentDecisions.title: Aquifer Commons 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Recovered the previously blocked groundwater strategy release after isolating its syntax failure, then retained three scenarios, six competing districts, clearer learning-valley guidance, seasonal recharge, permits, conservation, managed recharge, water-right transfers, salt intrusion, drought shocks, recovery, scoring, session unlocks, keyboard and touch controls, reduced motion, and teardown.

recentDecisions.title: Stratosphere Mission Control 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a local atmospheric strategy game with three missions, layered wind fields, altitude control, ballast, battery and thermal tradeoffs, sampling targets, forecast tokens, failures, recovery actions, scoring, session unlocks, keyboard and touch controls, reduced motion, and teardown.

recentDecisions.title: Pollinator Corridor Planner 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a local spatial ecology strategy game with three landscapes, seasonal forage, nesting and shelter tradeoffs, connectivity, pesticide shocks, budgets, recovery actions, scoring, session unlocks, keyboard and touch controls, reduced motion, and teardown.

recentDecisions.title: Animation Timing Studio 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a local animation craft game with three briefs, draggable keyframes, easing, anticipation, squash, follow-through, hold-frame tradeoffs, live SVG playback, scoring, session unlocks, keyboard and touch controls, reduced motion, and teardown.
